name: tripo-game
title: Tripo Game Upgrader
description: Replace low-poly geometry in AI-generated Three.js games with production-quality Tripo 3D assets (GPT-5.5 + Tripo combo skill).
author: baichaoyu

commands.name: detect
commands.description: List every upgradeable mesh + the prompt that would be sent to Tripo.

commands.name: upgrade
commands.description: Generate Tripo 3D assets and inject them into the HTML.
